zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan於1362年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑時，他的父親John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham24歲，母親Elizabeth Eglinton22歲。他於1381年與Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald在蘇格蘭艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1429年11月22日在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧享年67歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾文寧吉爾文寧 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan于1362年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑时，他的父亲John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham24岁，母亲Elizabeth Eglinton22岁。他于1381年与Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald在苏格兰艾斯爾阿爾德洛桑结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1429年11月22日在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧享年67岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾文寧吉爾文寧 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan was born in 1362, in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Eglinton, was 22. He married Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald in 1381, in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 22 November 1429, in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan est né en 1362, à Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Eglinton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald en 1381, à Ardrossan, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1429, à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

November 1429 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossanが1362年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアアルドロッサンで生まれた時，父John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eagleshamは24歳，母Elizabeth Eglintonは22歳であった。1381年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアアルドロッサンでLady Agnes of the Isles Macdonaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1429年11月22日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングで67歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアキルウィニングキルウィニング チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North: 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 킬윈잉 킬윈잉 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan(이)가 1362년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 아드로산에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Eglinton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1381년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 아드로산에서 Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년 11월 22일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 킬윈잉 킬윈잉 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

ru.Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North: килвиннинг чурчярд, килвиннинг, норт аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan родился в 1362 г. в местности ардроссан, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Eglinton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald в 1381 г. в местности ардроссан, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 22 ноября 1429 г. в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности килвиннинг чурчярд, килвиннинг, норт аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
